scope: Populated LOBBY content (chat/games/character) + 5 new screens (game-create, game-join, game-tech, game-summary, updating).

items.name: Populated LOBBY content (chat lines + game list rows + character stats)
items.spec: Extend RunDumpLobby (env SILENCER_DUMP_SCREEN=lobby) so the dump matches /tmp/real_lobby_populated_dump.ppm. Render: 5 chat lines (Vector/Solace/Ember/Vector/Halcyon, exact text per RALPH.md); 4 game list rows (Veterans Only / Tutorial / Capture the Tag / Casual Match #1); presence list (In Lobby + Pregame + Playing sections); character stats overlays (LEVEL: 8, WINS: 47, LOSSES: 12, XP TO NEXT LEVEL: 220); username 'demo' in CharacterInterface. All other LOBBY chrome unchanged.

items.name: lobby-game-create modal (form + map list + Create button)
items.spec: Per docs/design/screen-lobby-game-create.md: dispatch SILENCER_DUMP_SCREEN=lobby_gamecreate to a new RunDumpLobbyGameCreate. Render LOBBY chrome + populated content (reuse E0's machinery) + replace GameSelectInterface with the GameCreate form: 'Game Options' header, Security/Min Level/Max Level/Max Players/Max Teams labels + values, 'Select Maps:' label + map list (4 demo maps), Game Name input, Password input, Create button.

items.name: lobby-game-join modal (Choose Tech / Change Team / Ready)
items.spec: Per docs/design/screen-lobby-game-join.md: dispatch SILENCER_DUMP_SCREEN=lobby_gamejoin to a new RunDumpLobbyGameJoin. Render LOBBY chrome + populated content + 3 B156x21 buttons replacing GameSelectInterface region: Choose Tech (242,68), Change Team (242,100), Ready (242,160). 'Disconnected from game' overlay is non-structural — gate only on the 3 buttons + LOBBY behind.

items.name: lobby-game-tech modal (Back To Teams + tech grid)
items.spec: Per docs/design/screen-lobby-game-tech.md: dispatch SILENCER_DUMP_SCREEN=lobby_gametech to a new RunDumpLobbyGameTech. Render LOBBY chrome + Back To Teams B156x21 button (242,68) + tech checkbox grid scaffolding (BCHECKBOX placeholders) + tech name/desc placeholders. 'Disconnected from game' overlay non-structural.

items.name: lobby-game-summary (Mission Summary + Agency Upgrade panel)
items.spec: Per docs/design/screen-lobby-game-summary.md: dispatch SILENCER_DUMP_SCREEN=lobby_gamesummary to a new RunDumpLobbyGameSummary. Render starfield background + 'Mission Summary' title + ~22 stat row labels (left panel) + Agency Upgrade panel right (XP overlay + 6 +1-stat upgrade-row buttons + Done button). All numeric values can be empty/zero (runtime).

items.name: updating screen (bordered box + Cancel button)
items.spec: Per docs/design/screen-updating.md: dispatch SILENCER_DUMP_SCREEN=updating to a new RunDumpUpdating. Render dark/black background + bordered box centered around y=215 + Cancel B156x21 button right-aligned in the box. Text content runtime / non-structural.

items.name: Final visual equivalence across all 6 targets
items.spec: Final gate. Run all 6 candidate dumps, A/B each against its reference. Each is structurally equivalent (chrome / panel / borders / button outlines / labels) to a casual reader. Empty-data interiors (where applicable) acceptable. <2% diff on each, modulo runtime-text non-structural carve-outs documented in each item's spec.
